versions.version_description: The interlude is completely rewritten on the chords and sounds much more like the original than the existing chord contributions.
Original tabbed out with the help of this tutorial. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JFimkHUAB8w changed chords and added small transition.
I couldn't find a version where the chords on the 3rd verse sounds similar to the orignal song so I made a few changes and tried to keep this version easier to the beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Slow Dancing In A Burning Room
Waiting On The World To Change

content:
John Mayer - Daughters

[Intro]
Bm7/11  Em7/9  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]D6[/ch] 
 
[Verse 1]
Bm7/11    Em7/9 
I know a girl 
[tab]             [ch]G/A[/ch]                  [ch]D6[/ch] 
She puts the color inside of my world [/tab]
      Bm7/11           Em7/11   
But she's just like a maze 
[tab]                    [ch]G/A[/ch]                     [ch]D6[/ch] 
Where all of the walls all continually change [/tab]
     Bm7/11         Em7/11 
And I've done all I can  
[tab]                 [ch]G/A[/ch]                        [ch]D6[/ch] 
To stand on the steps with my heart in my hands [/tab]
Bm7/11              Em7/11 
Now I'm starting to see 
[tab]                  [ch]G/A[/ch]              [ch]D6[/ch]  
Maybe it's got nothing to do with me [/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]Bm7/11    [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]    
Fathers be good to your daughters, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11         [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ch]D6[/ch]   
Daughters will love like you do, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]          [ch]D6[/ch] 
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers [/tab]
[tab]   Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]D6[/ch] 
So mothers be good to your daughters too [/tab]
 
[Solo]
(Bm7/11  Em7/9  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]D6[/ch]) 
 
[Verse 2]
Bm7/11             Em7/9 
Oh, you see that skin? 
[tab]           [ch]G/A[/ch]                    [ch]D6[/ch] 
It's the same shes been standing in [/tab]
           Bm7/11           Em7/9 
Since the day she saw him walking away 
[tab]          [ch]G/A[/ch]  
Now shes left             [/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D6[/ch] 
Cleaning up the mess he made [/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]    Bm7/11    [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]    
So Fathers be good to your daughters, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11         [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ch]D6[/ch]   
Daughters will love like you do, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]          [ch]D6[/ch] 
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers [/tab]
[tab]   Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]D6[/ch] 
So mothers be good to your daughters too [/tab]
 
[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]Gm/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] 
      Boys you can break [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7+[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch] 
You'll find out how much they can take [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch] 
Boys will be strong and  [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D/F#[/ch] 
Boys soldier on [/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm[/ch] 
But boys would be gone  [/tab]
without warmth from  
[tab]  [ch]A7[/ch] 
A woman's good, good heart [/tab]
 
[Solo]
(Bm7/11  Em7/9  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]D6[/ch]) 
 
[Bridge]
[tab]  (Bm7/11  Em7/9  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]D6[/ch]) 
On behalf of every man [/tab]
Looking out for every girl 
You are the god and the weight of her world 
 
[Chorus]
[tab]    Bm7/11    [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]    
So Fathers be good to your daughters, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11         [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]    [ch]D6[/ch]   
Daughters will love like you do, [/tab]
[tab]Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]          [ch]D6[/ch] 
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers [/tab]
[tab]   Bm7/11        [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]D6[/ch] 
So mothers be good to your daughters too [/tab]


Chords used:
                           
Bm7/11  - 7 X 7 7 5 X
Em7/9   - X 7 5 7 7 X
[ch]G/A[/ch]     - X 0 5 4 3 3
[tab][ch]D6[/ch]      - X 5 4 2 0 X
Em7/11  - X 7 X 7 8 5[/tab]
[ch]E7[/ch]      - 0 2 2 1 3 0
[ch]Am/D[/ch]    - X X 0 2 1 0
[ch]Gm/D[/ch]    - X 5 5 3 3 3 
[ch]D[/ch]       - X X 0 2 3 2
[ch]D7+[/ch]     - X X 0 2 2 2
[ch]Bm[/ch]      - X 2 4 4 3 2   
[ch]Em[/ch]      - 0 2 2 0 0 0 
[ch]D/F#[/ch]    - 2 X 0 2 3 2
[ch]Gm[/ch]      - 3 5 5 3 3 3
[ch]A7[/ch]      - X 0 2 0 2 0
